title: Glaiden's audio Aeronautics compat
description: mod provides compatability through Glaiden's audio mod and Aeronautics
body:
Mod allows Glaiden's Audio mod blocks to work properly on Aeronautics physics objects.
Without this mod boombox, redstone dynamic and other stuff from the mod wont emit sounds on physics objects from Create Aeronautics. Radio system right now is not fully implemented for physics objects and works localy on every physics structure.

Mod requires Glaiden's audio, Create and Create Aeronautics ofc.

[Join our Discord!](https://discord.gg/SqxFTaFkWp)
